activities_projects.title: Main Characters Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify the important characters in the lesson
steps: Read the lesson carefully
Identify the main characters in the story
Write one line about each character

activities_projects.title: Character Sketch of Lushkoff
steps: Find the description of Lushkoff in the lesson
Write 4–5 sentences describing his life and behaviour

activities_projects.title: Role of Sergei
activities_projects.objective: Understand Sergei’s role in the story
steps: Read the conversation between Sergei and Lushkoff
Write three points showing how Sergei helps him

activities_projects.title: Importance of Olga
activities_projects.objective: Understand Olga’s role in changing Lushkoff
steps: Read the part where Olga helps Lushkoff
Write 3–4 sentences explaining her kindness

activities_projects.title: Reason for Lushkoff’s Lies
activities_projects.objective: Understand why Lushkoff lies to people
steps: Find the section where Lushkoff explains his lies
Write the reasons in 3–4 sentences

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the flow of the story
steps: Identify four major events in the story
Arrange them in correct order

activities_projects.title: Message of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Identify the moral message of the lesson
steps: Think about the lesson learned from the story
Write the moral in 3–4 sentences

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary from the Lesson
steps: Select five new words from the lesson
Write their meanings
Use each word in a sentence

activities_projects.title: Lushkoff’s Transformation
activities_projects.objective: Understand the change in Lushkoff’s life
steps: Read the last part of the lesson
Write how Lushkoff’s life changed after meeting Sergei and Olga

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Connection
activities_projects.objective: Relate the story to real life
steps: Think about helping poor or needy people
Write 3–4 sentences about how we can help them
